overall_assessment: The diff is mostly straightforward, but one new path can fail on malformed input before validation.

findings.title: Missing null-safe title normalization
findings.summary: The new branch calls strip() on the incoming title before checking whether the payload actually provided a string. A malformed request can raise before returning a controlled validation error.

missing_context: The related request validation tests were not included in the diff.
publish_recommendation: 建议先保留为草稿并确认上游是否已经保证 title 一定为字符串。
